title: Period to Appeal. The party aggrieved by an Order/Decision may appeal
content: 50 the same within fifteen (15) calendar days from receipt of a copy thereof. No motion or 51 request for extension of the period within which to perfect an appeal shall be allowed. 52 53 A Motion for Reconsideration shall be treated as an appeal. 54 55
